verif_result.fix_hint: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=20 across 32768 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.verilator_stderr: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=20 across 32768 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.classifier_reason: Simulation completed with correct timing (1 cycle, 512 outputs received) but systematic value underestimation. All 7857 errors are strictly negative (signed_error_sum=-25352, positive_error_count=0), meaning RTL outputs are consistently smaller than golden. This is the classic relu rescale bug pattern seen in this repo: the RTL applies max(0,x) but omits the activation requantization (input_scale/output_scale rescale), causing outputs to be scaled down by approximately scale_factor≈0.75. The contract (flat-bus, 512-bit, int8_symmetric_per_tensor) is viable; a Surgeon repair adding the per-tensor requant scale application will fix it.
